title: Modify pod API to move Init() into Start()
body:
Separate Init() and Start() does not make sense on the pod side, where we may have to start containers in order to initialize others due to dependency orders.

Also adjusts internal containers API for more code sharing.

This completes the pod API. We can begin implementing pod commands.

comments.body: LGTM, one small nit to tie up in another PR when you get a chance.
